title: A7MD's Better Sand
description: Changes Both Red and Normal sand
body:
# _**🌵 A7MD's Better Sand 🌵**_
---
Changes the Normal Boring Minecraft default Snad Texture
into a new smooth bright yellowish colored Texture

---
## _**✨ Features:**_
✔️Bright Yellowish Sand - same as real life

✔️Great for content creation or modapcks

✔️Works with all sand blocks - **Chiseled** - **Cut**- **Sand Stone** - **Suspicious Sand**.

✔️Works With all types - **Red** - **Normal**.


---
## _**🎮 How to Install:**_

Download the pack (.zip file).

Move it to your resourcepacks folder.

Enable it in Minecraft Settings > Resource Packs.

---

- **Survival**
- **Building**
- **Modpacks**


Enjoy your new Sand!
